english: po yin (po yin) he is king over all subjugated animals Mil. The partic. pf. bkód-pa (bkod pa) is also sbst.: 1. plan, ground-plan, draught of a building Schr. -- 2. delineation, sketch, zin-bkód (zin bkod) map. -- 3. form, shape, figure Schr. -- 4. sample, copy, even of one's own body, e.g. when a person multiplies himself by magic virtue, = sprúl-ba (sprul ba). -- 5. building, edifice, structure, bkód-pa mdzes (bkod pa mdzes) the structure (is) beautiful Glr. -- 6. frame, body, bkód-pa lus (bkod pa lus) id. Mil.; ṅai bkód-pa nám-mkai raṅ-źin (nga'i bkod pa nam mkha'i rang bzhin) my body of an ethereal nature Pth. Note. The Lexx. have for bkód-pa (bkod pa) always न्यास putting down, depositing; but often it has the signification of व्यूह orderly arrangement; as vb. it comes nearest to उपचय. As the meaning of the word is almost quite the same as that of κτίζειν and condere, it recommends itself as the most suitable term for 'to create', to call into existence, _gód-pa-po ('god pa po) for creator, and bkód-pa (bkod pa) for creature, notions which are otherwise foreign to Buddhism.
Cs. = góms-pa (goms pa), Sch. also = gém-pa (gem pa), gúm-pa (gum pa).
1. v. the following article. -- 2. termin. of 'go ('go), in the beginning, at first Sch. -- 3. supine of 'gó-ba ('go ba).

to tarry, linger, loiter, W. frq. *maṅ-po yor soṅ* (mang po yor song) you stayed away very long; *lám-la gor* (lam la 'gor) he lingers on the way; *maṅ-po ma gòr-te* (mang po ma 'gor te) without long delay, = riṅ-por ma lón-par (ring por ma lon par), and riṅ-por mi togs-par (ring por mi togs par) B.; de gor-gźi yin (de 'gor gzhi yin) that impedes, delays; zlá-ba gnyis _gor (zla ba gnyis 'gor) (the work) lasted two months Glr.

pf. gol (gol) 1. to part, to separate vb.n.; _gól-bai gnas ('gol ba'i gnas) a hermitage Pth., _gól-po ('gol po) hermit, recluse. -- 2. to deviate, err, go wrong or astray; _gól-sa ('gol sa) 1. the place where two roads separate. 2. error, mistake.
cf. skyág-pa (skyag pa), to be sold, spent, expended Cs.

pf. gyaṅs (gyangs), to be delayed, deferred, postponed, pýir gyaṅ-na (phyir gyang na) if one defers it; *nyin _gyaṅ źag _gyaṅ jhe'-pa* (nyin 'gyang zhag 'gyang byed pa) C. to delay again and again; lo maṅ-po mi _gyaṅ-bar (lo mang po mi 'gyang bar) before many years shall have passed; dus _gyaṅs (dus gyangs) Lex. w.e.

1. to look about haughtily, to look down upon, to slight, mi-la (mi la) a person; also of things: to despise, contemn, neglect them B. and col.: *gyíṅ-bhág jhe'-pa* (gying bag byed pa) C., *gyíṅ cò-če* (gying bco ce) W. id.; *gyíṅ-čàn* (gying can) supercilious, contemptuous. -- 2. = sgyíṅ-ba (sgying ba) Glr.; Mil. -- śél-kyi gyíṅ- _kár (shel kyi gying 'khar) a sceptre of crystal, an attribute of gods, in pictures represented as a plain, unadorned staff.
pf. gyus (gyus), to move quickly to and fro, e.g. as lightning, the quivering air in a mirage, the motion and versatility of the mind etc.

I. vb., pf. gyur (gyur) (-to (-to), -pa (-pa)) imp. gyur (gyur) (-cig (-cig)), cf. sgyúr-ba (sgyur ba), 1. to change, to be altered B. and col.; mi-rnáms-kyi spyód-pa _gyur (mi rnams kyi spyod pa 'gyur) the behaviour of men changes Ma.; _gyúr-bai čos ('gyur ba'i chos) a changeable (and therefore perishable) thing Cs.; and _gyúr-du yód-pa ('gyur du yod pa) changeable, variable, _gyúr-du méd-pa ('gyur du med pa), _gyur-med ('gyur med) unchangeable, invariable; sometimes to decrease, abate, vanish, die away, mt'u-stóbs (mthu stobs), nád-med-pa (nad med pa), gzi-rjíd (gzi brjid) yóṅs-su _gyur-ba (yongs su 'gyur ba) the total decay of strength, health, and esteem (in old age) Thgy.; bdág-gi sems ma gyur (bdag gi sems ma gyur), ma nyáms-so (ma nyams so) my mind has not been altered, nor my resolution weakened Dzl.; also with las: dád-pa _dí-las ma gyur čig (dad pa 'di las ma gyur cig) do not depart from that belief Mil. (I have therefore availed myself of this word, combined with the active (transitive) form sems sgyúr-ba (sems sgyur ba) 'to change the mind' for expressing the μετανοεῖν and μετάνοια of the N. T., though the Buddhist is wont to regard the mi-gyúr-ba (mi 'gyur ba) as the thing most to be praised and desired.) With the termin. it signifies to be changed, transformed into; B. and col.; hence -- 2. to become, to grow, dge-slóṅ-du _gyúr-ba (dge slong du 'gyur ba), rgyál-por _gyúr-ba (rgyal por 'gyur ba) to become
